description: All gallery images have an infrared red tint filter applied

filter.note: Warm red/infrared color tint applied to all gallery images. Inspired by space telescope infrared imaging (JWST, Spitzer). Artistic filter, not scientific false-color.

video_filter.note: Warm, bright res-light CSS filter applied to the Artemis II earthrise/earthset hero video.

convention: All new images added to this gallery MUST have this filter applied before committing
